title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 11–14, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Out of the way, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So there's really no problem, then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm just saying that you're thoughtless!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why've you only been blocking my attacks

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Wait, there's still a room further in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's a bit cold in here

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
